programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Ashamed that he can't afford to buy a birthday present for Lyndsey, Alan gets creative.

programme.title: SisterS
programme.desc: Suze battles grief, uncovers family secrets, and faces surprises at Sare's pre-wedding spa day.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.sub-title: Chocolate Diddlers or My Puppy's Dead
programme.desc: Depressed after his breakup from Courtney (Jenny McCarthy), Charlie goes to see his psychiatrist (Jane Lynch).

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Bridget (Judy Greer) reappears in Walden's life as he is trying to impress a new love interest.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Alan develops a crush on Walden's visiting mother; a secret comes out about Walden's past.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Roper thinks he sold the roommates a classic car.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack defends Chrissy's honor when a man follows her home from a bar.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Mrs. Roper takes a job to spite her husband.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Chrissy and Jack are home alone for one night.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Chrissy asks Jack to cook a meal so she can impress a gourmet.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Mr. Roper is suspected of seeing another woman.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack's uncle pays the rent with a bad check.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Janet runs into her high-school sweetheart.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The Ropers invite Jack and the girls to their Christmas party.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Chrissy thinks Mrs. Roper's gift is for her.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Chrissy agree to take over Janet's babysitting job for a night; to their dismay, they face a crying baby, no TV and a locked liquor cabinet.

programme.title: The Warriors
programme.desc: A turf battle between New York City street gangs that rages from Coney Island to the Bronx. The Warriors are mistakenly fingered for the killing of a gang leader. Soon they have every gang in the city out to get revenge, and they must make their way across the city to their own turf.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Stand by Me
programme.desc: After learning that a stranger has been accidentally killed near their rural homes, four Oregon boys decide to go see the body. On the way, Gordie Lachance (Wil Wheaton), Vern Tessio (Jerry O'Connell), Chris Chambers (River Phoenix) and Teddy Duchamp (Corey Feldman) encounter a mean junk man and a marsh full of leeches, as they also learn more about one another and their very different home lives. Just a lark at first, the boys' adventure evolves into a defining event in their lives.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Who's Harry Crumb?
programme.desc: Harry Crumb descends from a long line of sleuths, but the well-intentioned private detective tends to turn the simplest case into a disaster. That's why Harry's maniacal boss, Eliot Draisen, selects him to investigate the kidnapping of a rich heiress; Draisen himself is behind the crime, and he's hoping that Harry will perform as dismally as he usually does. But, with more than a few tricks up his sleeve, Harry may end up cracking the conspiracy despite himself.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Brewster's Millions
programme.desc: After losing his position as a minor-league pitcher, Montgomery Brewster (Richard Pryor) learns his great-uncle has left him $300 million. To inherit it, Brewster must spend $30 million in 30 days under a complicated set of rules that forbid him from donating too much to charity or retaining any new assets when the period is up. Unable to share details about the will's odd conditions with anyone, Brewster sets out to spend his money under the stern eye of paralegal Angela Drake (Lonette McKee).

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Blazing Saddles
programme.desc: In this satirical take on Westerns, crafty railroad worker Bart (Cleavon Little) becomes the first black sheriff of Rock Ridge, a frontier town about to be destroyed in order to make way for a new railroad. Initially, the people of Rock Ridge harbor a racial bias toward their new leader. However, they warm to him after realizing that Bart and his perpetually drunk gunfighter friend (Gene Wilder) are the only defense against a wave of thugs sent to rid the town of its population.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: A brief complication after minor surgery forces the Barones to consider life without Raymond.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra yearns for nothing more than a peaceful birthday at home with her husband, but Ray's lie to his parents and brother catch the couple in a compromising situation.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra gets mad when Ray's problem with showing affection for her becomes a family matter.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray hopes the family-themed eulogy he gives for his Uncle Gus will extinguish the sparks of a family feud.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Alan feels paranoid when Lyndsey becomes friendly with Charlie.

programme.sub-title: Three Hookers and a Philly Cheesesteak
programme.desc: Charlie and Rose continue their affair; Alan's business becomes a Ponzi scheme.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Rose discovers Alan's Ponzi scheme; Alan meets Rose's "husband"; Charlie tries to get time alone with Rose.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie's life turns upside down when his brother and nephew move in; at the supermarket, Charlie discovers he can use 10-year-old Jake to attract women.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie doesn't know how to discipline Jake for luring a flock of sea gulls into his room; Judith surprises Alan when he goes home to fix her sprinklers.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.sub-title: Go East on Sunset Until You Reach the Gates of Hell
programme.desc: One drink too many emboldens the brothers to stand up to their controlling mother.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.sub-title: If I Can't Write My Chocolate Song, I'm Going to Take a Nap
programme.desc: Alan offers to help get Charlie's cleaning lady back if Charlie can get Jake ready to go out to dinner with his mother.

programme.sub-title: The Last Thing You Want Is to Wind Up With a Hump

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.sub-title: Did You Check With the Captain of the Flying Monkeys?
programme.desc: After Evelyn's new beau dumps her, Charlie and Alan enlist Jake to cheer her up; Charlie teaches Jake a lesson about screening telephone calls from women.

programme.desc: Walden and Bridget go head-to-head trying to take over his company, Walden Loves Bridget Inc.; Walden turns to Alan for help.

programme.title: Blazing Saddles
programme.desc: In this satirical take on Westerns, crafty railroad worker Bart (Cleavon Little) becomes the first black sheriff of Rock Ridge, a frontier town about to be destroyed in order to make way for a new railroad. Initially, the people of Rock Ridge harbor a racial bias toward their new leader. However, they warm to him after realizing that Bart and his perpetually drunk gunfighter friend (Gene Wilder) are the only defense against a wave of thugs sent to rid the town of its population.

programme.title: Brewster's Millions
programme.desc: After losing his position as a minor-league pitcher, Montgomery Brewster (Richard Pryor) learns his great-uncle has left him $300 million. To inherit it, Brewster must spend $30 million in 30 days under a complicated set of rules that forbid him from donating too much to charity or retaining any new assets when the period is up. Unable to share details about the will's odd conditions with anyone, Brewster sets out to spend his money under the stern eye of paralegal Angela Drake (Lonette McKee).

programme.title: Night Court
programme.sub-title: My Life as a Dog Lawyer
programme.desc: Dan (John Larroquette) is humiliated by appearing in dog court when he returns to work. With Harry Anderson.

programme.title: The Three Stooges
programme.desc: The boys run a used chariot lot in Egypt.

programme.title: Stand by Me
programme.desc: After learning that a stranger has been accidentally killed near their rural homes, four Oregon boys decide to go see the body. On the way, Gordie Lachance (Wil Wheaton), Vern Tessio (Jerry O'Connell), Chris Chambers (River Phoenix) and Teddy Duchamp (Corey Feldman) encounter a mean junk man and a marsh full of leeches, as they also learn more about one another and their very different home lives. Just a lark at first, the boys' adventure evolves into a defining event in their lives.

Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Who's Harry Crumb?
programme.desc: Harry Crumb descends from a long line of sleuths, but the well-intentioned private detective tends to turn the simplest case into a disaster. That's why Harry's maniacal boss, Eliot Draisen, selects him to investigate the kidnapping of a rich heiress; Draisen himself is behind the crime, and he's hoping that Harry will perform as dismally as he usually does. But, with more than a few tricks up his sleeve, Harry may end up cracking the conspiracy despite himself.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Starship Troopers
programme.desc: In the distant future, the Earth is at war with a race of giant alien insects. Little is known about the Bugs except that they are intent on the eradication of all human life. But there was a time before the war... A Mobile Infantry travels to distant alien planets to take the war to the Bugs. They are a ruthless enemy with only one mission: Survival of their species no matter what the cost...

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Centre national du cinéma et de l'image animée
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Total Recall
programme.desc: Douglas Quaid is a bored construction worker in the year 2084 who dreams of visiting colonized Mars. He visits "Rekall," a company that plants false memories into people's brains, in order to experience the thrill of Mars without having to travel there. But something goes wrong during the procedure; Quaid discovers that his entire life is actually a false memory and that the people who implanted it in his head now want him dead.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Batman
programme.desc: Having witnessed his parents' brutal murder as a child, millionaire philanthropist Bruce Wayne (Michael Keaton) fights crime in Gotham City disguised as Batman, a costumed hero who strikes fear into the hearts of villains. But when a deformed madman who calls himself "The Joker" (Jack Nicholson) seizes control of Gotham's criminal underworld, Batman must face his most ruthless nemesis ever while protecting both his identity and his love interest, reporter Vicki Vale (Kim Basinger).

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Batman Returns
programme.desc: The monstrous Penguin (Danny DeVito), who lives in the sewers beneath Gotham, joins up with wicked shock-headed businessman Max Shreck (Christopher Walken) to topple the Batman (Michael Keaton) once and for all. But when Shreck's timid assistant, Selina Kyle (Michelle Pfeiffer), finds out, and Shreck tries to kill her, she is transformed into the sexy Catwoman. She teams up with the Penguin and Shreck to destroy Batman, but sparks fly unexpectedly when she confronts the caped crusader.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Batman
programme.desc: Having witnessed his parents' brutal murder as a child, millionaire philanthropist Bruce Wayne (Michael Keaton) fights crime in Gotham City disguised as Batman, a costumed hero who strikes fear into the hearts of villains. But when a deformed madman who calls himself "The Joker" (Jack Nicholson) seizes control of Gotham's criminal underworld, Batman must face his most ruthless nemesis ever while protecting both his identity and his love interest, reporter Vicki Vale (Kim Basinger).

programme.title: Batman Returns
programme.desc: The monstrous Penguin (Danny DeVito), who lives in the sewers beneath Gotham, joins up with wicked shock-headed businessman Max Shreck (Christopher Walken) to topple the Batman (Michael Keaton) once and for all. But when Shreck's timid assistant, Selina Kyle (Michelle Pfeiffer), finds out, and Shreck tries to kill her, she is transformed into the sexy Catwoman. She teams up with the Penguin and Shreck to destroy Batman, but sparks fly unexpectedly when she confronts the caped crusader.
